detail.description: Nick Sogard grounds out, second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson.

Nick Sogard singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Bryce Elder. Nick Sogard to 3rd. Nick Sogard advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Bryce Elder.
Nick Sogard doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón. Mickey Gasper to 3rd.
Nick Sogard grounds out, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson.
Nick Sogard flies out to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.

Nick Sogard flies out to right fielder Austin Martin.

Nick Sogard singles on a line drive to center fielder Austin Martin.
Nick Sogard singles on a fly ball to left fielder Gabriel Gonzalez. Andruw Monasterio to 3rd.
Nick Sogard grounds out, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Salvador Perez.

Nick Sogard doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Connor Wong scores.
